race.comment: DAVIKAR (3) has been just behind the placegetters in all three runs this preparation and looks to be working up to another victory. Boasts a win around this circuit and should be right there when the judge calls a halt. CHICAGO KING (1) doesn't win out of turn but has a handy record over this distance range with a win and five placings from eight attempts. Only needs some luck navigating from the sticky draw to play a major role in the outcome. BOLE LE (5) resumes here but the form he showed when last in work was good enough to be competitive in a race of this calibre. Can run a race while fresh. SCOUNDREL (2) will be ready to peak now third run back from a break and may earn some minor money. DUSHENKA (7) rounds out the selections.
